customer_message: I got hiking boots 12 days ago and wore them on two hikes. Can I return them?
forbidden_terms: you can return|refund to original payment|full refund
case_note: Worn items should fail even inside 30 days.

customer_message: My rain jacket arrived with a broken zipper yesterday. Can you replace it?
case_note: Damaged item is eligible, but the answer should ask for photos and mention the short reporting window.

customer_message: I received a backpack as a gift and do not have a receipt. Can I get my money back?
case_note: Gift without proof of purchase is only store credit.

customer_message: I bought a final-sale tent and one pole arrived cracked. Am I stuck with it?
case_note: Final-sale exception applies when the item arrived damaged.

customer_message: The final-sale fleece I bought is too small. Can I exchange it?
forbidden_terms: you can exchange|eligible for exchange|45-day exchange
case_note: Final-sale size issues are not eligible.

customer_message: I want to return a water bottle, but I am not sure when it arrived. Can I send it back?
forbidden_terms: you can send it back|you can return|refund
case_note: Missing date and condition should trigger NEEDS_INFO.

customer_message: I bought a sleeping bag 20 days ago. Can I return it?
forbidden_terms: you can return|refund|eligible for a return
case_note: Inside 30 days, but item condition and packaging are missing.

customer_message: I bought a backpack 60 days ago and it is unused. Can I exchange it for a different color?
forbidden_terms: you can exchange|eligible for a different color
